case_number: Civil Court where a Civil Suit No.72/2022

chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No.S-991 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge D/O Matter For order on CMA No.3839/2025. 02.06.2025 Mr. Farmanullah, Advocate for the Petitioners a/w Ms. Khizra Fatima Advocate. Mr. Ahmed Khan Khaskheli, AAG Sindh. PI/SHO Imran Afridi of PS SITE. ------------------------------- This petition was disposed of vide order dated 23.11.2023 wherein the official respondents were directed to act under the law and shall be neutral in private affairs and no harassment shall be caused to either party. However, if the petitioner or private respondent indulged in cognizable offences police shall act under law strictly. Thereafter on 13.05.2025 CMA No.3839/2025 was filed seeking the indulgence of this Court that one Imran Afridi, SHO PS SITE-A and Ch. Javed, SHO PS Ittehad were causing harassment to the petitioner and interfering into private affairs. On notices the SHO PS Ittehad has filed his reply wherein it has been stated that he has taken the charge recently and he has not caused any harassment against the petitioner. Imran Afridi, alleged contemnor No.1, has also filed his reply wherein he stated that he has been transferred from PS SITE and the property under the dispute between the parties over immovable property is going on which does not fall within the jurisdiction of police station SITE. They have stated that they were acting strictly in accordance with law and they have not disobeyed the earlier order dated 23.11.2023 passed by this Court. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the orders passed earlier by this Court are not being complied with in stricto sensu and the official respondents at the instance of the private respondents are still causing harassment.

They have stated that they were acting strictly in accordance with law and they have not disobeyed the earlier order dated 23.11.2023 passed by this Court. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the orders passed earlier by this Court are not being complied with in stricto sensu and the official respondents at the instance of the private respondents are still causing harassment. Since there is a dispute between the parties over a plot bearing No.F/761, SITE Town, Karachi, and that being a dispute of civil nature the appropriate forum for the redressal of the grievance would be a competent Civil Court where a Civil Suit No.72/2022 is pending. However, the official respondents are directed to act strictly in accordance with law in compliance of the earlier order passed by this Court without giving favour to any party. The listed application stands disposed of with the warning that SHO PS SITE-A and SHO PS Ittehad to comply with this order and the earlier orders and if any evidence is brought on record depicting that they are involved in causing harassment to the petitioner, appropriate action including the initiation of the contempt proceeding shall follow. CMA No.3839/2025 stands disposed of. J U D G E Asif
